title: About
text:
I’m Sofia Fabian, a postdoctoral researcher in hydrology and climate science.
I’m a chemical engineer by training, with three and a half years of R&D experience at a semiconductor company before moving into research. A diverse background that taught me to value an independent strong work ethic, and leaning into own curiosity and serendipity. I’ve always believed that to research, is to know, to understand, and to solve. I’m now orienting toward the space where climate and environmental modeling meets policy decision.
I love tennis, but can’t guarantee I’m good at it.I love camping and I bet it loves me back :)

title: Research
text: My curiosity and research interest sit between how climate extremes transition to environmental changes and variability, particularly water quality and ecological health. My current projects examine drought-algal bloom dynamics and how drought influences physicochemical properties of water and shape biological indicators of river health.

title: Research
text:
Publications
[5] Pamela Sofia Fabian, YoonKyung Cha, Kyung-A You, Hyun-Han Kwon, ‘Spatiotemporal Dynamics of Summer Chlorophyll-a Concentrations Under Varying Drought Conditions in a Hierarchical Bayesian Model’, Chemical Engineering Journal 2025.
[4] Hemie Cho, Pamela Sofia Fabian, Sang-Hoon Lee, Kyung-A You, Hyun-Han Kwon, ‘Decadal Trends and Predictive Insights into Aquatic Ecosystem Health in the Namhan River, South Korea: Longitudinal Analysis of Hydro-Environmental Factors and Stream Health Indices (2008–2022)’, Environmental Pollution 2024.
[3] Pamela Sofia Fabian, Hyun-Han Kwon, Meththika Vithanage, Joo-Heon Lee, ‘Modeling, challenges and strategies for understanding impacts of climate extremes (droughts and floods) on water quality in Asia: A review’, Environmental Research 2023.
[2] Pamela Sofia Fabian, Dong Hoon Lee, Sang Wook Shin, and Joo-Hyon Kang, ‘Assessment of Pyrene Adsorption on Biochars Prepared from Green Infrastructure Plants: Toward a Closed-Loop Recycling in Managing Toxic Stormwater Pollutants’, Journal of Water Process Engineering 2022.
[1] Dong Hoon Lee, Pamela Sofia Fabian, Jin Hwi Kim, Joo-Hyon Kang, ‘HSPF-Based Assessment of Inland Nutrient Source Control Strategies to Reduce Algal Blooms in Streams in Response to Future Climate Changes’, Sustainability 2021.
[Under Review]
[2] Pamela Sofia Fabian, YoonKyung Cha, Hyun-Han Kwon, ‘Intra-annual chlorophyll-a dynamics under hydroclimatic extremes derived from a 44-year baseline: insights from a temperate river system (Nakdong River Basin, South Korea)’, Water Resources Research [2nd Stage of Review]
[1] Pamela Sofia Fabian, Hemie Cho, Yoo-Geun Ham, Hyun-Han Kwon, ‘Climate-informed streamflow forecasting based on a Bayesian autoregressive exogenous stochastic volatility model and its use for hydrological drought forecasting, Journal of Hydrology [2nd Stage of Review]
